findings.title: ensureTiresForSetup 8 mm hard fallback creates Tire rows appearing as real tread
findings.evidence: tire-identity.service.ts lines 92-97: frontTread/rearTread default to literal 8 when no setup tread fields; stored as Tire.initialTreadDepthMm
findings.dataQuerySummary: VEHICLE_003 and VEHICLE_006 classified SETUP_INCOMPLETE with 8 mm default tires in fleet-coverage CSV
findings.impact: Identity baseline poisoned; UI shows numeric mm as fact; wear projection uses fallback_estimate semantics without explicit provenance on Tire row
findings.reproduction: Install tire setup without initialTreadFrontMm/RearMm/DepthMm; inspect created Tire rows via ensureTiresForSetup unit test or VPS query on setups without measurements
findings.recommendation: Refuse tire creation without explicit tread or mark rows ESTIMATED with source enum; block recalc health claims until measured
requiredTests: ensureTiresForSetup rejects missing tread without explicit fallback flag
UI displays ESTIMATED for 8 mm backfill rows

findings.title: No DB uniqueness on one ACTIVE VehicleTireSetup per vehicle
findings.evidence: schema.prisma VehicleTireSetup: @@index on status only; no partial unique on (vehicleId) WHERE status=ACTIVE
findings.dataQuerySummary: Code review; prod shows 6 vehicles each with 1 ACTIVE setup at probe time but constraint not enforced
findings.impact: Race or service bypass could create duplicate ACTIVE setups; recalc and rental gate may read wrong setup
findings.reproduction: Concurrent installTireSet calls without transaction guard; inspect schema for missing partial unique index
findings.recommendation: Add partial unique index vehicle_id WHERE status=ACTIVE; enforce in TireLifecycleService transaction
requiredTests: Concurrent activate/install rejects second ACTIVE setup
Migration adds partial unique constraint

findings.title: installed_odometer_km null on all setups — zero TireWearDataPoint rows despite 1320 recalcs
findings.evidence: SELECT count(*) FROM tire_wear_data_points returned 0; 1320 RECALCULATION events in 60d; all 6 ACTIVE setups have installed_odometer_km IS NULL
findings.dataQuerySummary: VPS read-only SQL Phase 3; recalculate guard requires currentOdo>installedOdo
findings.impact: Regression blend and fleet accuracy metrics non-functional; model validation pipeline blocked
findings.reproduction: Run tire-health-phase3-readonly.sql on VPS; verify installed_odometer_km IS NULL for all active setups
findings.recommendation: Populate installed_odometer_km on install/activate; verify createMany path after guard passes
requiredTests: recalculate writes wear data points when odometer anchor set
installTireSet sets installedOdometerKm

findings.title: recalculate() writes predicted tread as actualTreadMm when no measurement exists
findings.evidence: tire-health.service.ts lines 428-429: actualFrontAvg falls back to frontAvgPredicted when measFrontVals empty
findings.dataQuerySummary: Code review confirmed; prod table empty so no stored synthetic residuals yet — latent until P0-TH-03 fixed
findings.impact: When data points begin writing, regression/k-factor calibration may self-reinforce model bias with zero residuals
findings.reproduction: Read tire-health.service.ts recalculate path; trigger recalc on setup without measurement after odometer fix
findings.recommendation: Skip data-point insert without measurement; add source enum column; exclude synthetic rows from regression
requiredTests: recalculate does not insert wear data point without measurement
filterRegressionDataPoints excludes predicted-only rows

findings.title: RentalHealthService.getSummary without HM context — DIMO-only pressure on rental gate
findings.evidence: rental-health.service.ts:108 calls tires.getSummary(vehicleId) without hmTirePressure; intelligence API injects HM at controller:365-376
findings.dataQuerySummary: Code path comparison rental-health vs GET /vehicles/:id/tires/summary
findings.impact: Booking gate and rental-health UI may miss HM TPMS ISSUE; pressure source mislabeled when DIMO values present
findings.reproduction: Compare rental-health tire module output vs /tires/summary for vehicle with HM pressure only
findings.recommendation: Inject getTirePressureSignals in rental-health path; split source enum DIMO/HM/MIXED
requiredTests: rental-health evaluateTires uses HM pressure when DIMO absent
blocking matches intelligence API summary

findings.title: activateStoredSet resets installedAt/installedOdometerKm but keeps totalKmOnSet
findings.evidence: tire-lifecycle.service.ts activateStoredSet: sets installedAt=now and installedOdometerKm from resolveOdometer; totalKmOnSet unchanged
findings.impact: Wear projection window inconsistent after re-activation; km-since-anchor may under/over-project until remeasure
findings.reproduction: Activate stored set; compare totalKmOnSet before/after vs new installedAt
findings.recommendation: Reset totalKmOnSet on re-activation or carry forward explicit period anchor with measurement
requiredTests: activateStoredSet projection uses consistent km window
recalc after re-activate matches expected wear

findings.title: initialTreadSource column stores current tread source not initial mount provenance
findings.evidence: tire-health.service.ts:391 writes initialTreadSource: wearAnalysis.explainability.currentTreadSource on each recalc
findings.dataQuerySummary: Code review; column name vs write semantics mismatch
findings.impact: Audit trail and evidence hierarchy misleading; backtest classifies rows incorrectly if column trusted
findings.reproduction: Recalc setup with calibration; observe initialTreadSource changes to calibration_projection
findings.recommendation: Rename column or write immutable initial provenance at install only
requiredTests: initialTreadSource immutable after first write
backtest uses correct provenance field

findings.title: urbanBias and highwayBias in AI spec parsed but unused in wear calculation
findings.evidence: ai-tire-spec-normalizer.ts parses urbanBias/highwayBias; tire-wear-model.service.ts computeWearAnalysis has no reference to these fields
findings.dataQuerySummary: Grep urbanBias in tires/ — only config parse, no wear math
findings.impact: AI spec fields create false confidence in route-bias modeling; documented factors not applied
findings.reproduction: Apply AI spec with urbanBias=2.0; verify wear output unchanged vs urbanBias=0
findings.recommendation: Wire into behavior factor or remove from persisted spec and UI
requiredTests: urbanBias affects behaviorFactor when enabled
or fields removed from AI spec schema

findings.title: buildPersistedAiTireSpec forces userConfirmedSpec true on AI apply
findings.evidence: ai-tire-spec-normalizer.ts:203 sets userConfirmedSpec: true in buildPersistedAiTireSpec
findings.dataQuerySummary: Code review Phase 2 spec audit Q3
findings.impact: Confidence bonus +30 for userConfirmedSpec applied without human confirmation; overstates spec trust
findings.reproduction: POST AI tire spec apply; inspect aiTireSpec JSON userConfirmedSpec=true without user action
findings.recommendation: Set userConfirmedSpec false until explicit user confirm endpoint
requiredTests: AI apply leaves userConfirmedSpec false
confirm endpoint sets true

findings.title: Tire pressure unit not validated at DIMO ingest — bar assumed
findings.evidence: dimo-snapshot.processor.ts extractSnapshotFields stores raw values; no kPa→bar conversion; catalog documents bar
findings.dataQuerySummary: Code review; confirmed by P1-TH-12 VPS values 274-301 on VEHICLE_002
findings.impact: Foundation for kPa/bar bug; any new DIMO TPMS vehicle inherits wrong unit interpretation
findings.reproduction: Inspect dimo-snapshot.processor tire pressure field mapping; compare DIMO docs kPa vs stored values
findings.recommendation: Normalize kPa to bar at ingest with unit metadata column
requiredTests: DIMO 275 kPa stored as 2.75 bar
computePressureFactor receives bar

findings.title: TireWearDataPoint appended every recalc without dedupe when guard passes
findings.evidence: tire-health.service.ts createMany on each recalculate; no hour-bucket dedupe unlike BullMQ scheduler
findings.dataQuerySummary: Code review Phase 1 R-TH-04; 0 rows in prod because P0-TH-03 guard blocks writes
findings.impact: When enabled, hourly recalc creates duplicate regression training rows; storage and fit skew
findings.reproduction: Enable odometer anchor; run recalc twice same hour; count wear data points
findings.recommendation: Upsert or skip insert per (setupId, hourBucket, axle)
requiredTests: Second recalc same hour does not duplicate wear data point

findings.title: updateTireUsageFromTrip increments setup counters only not Tire.totalKmOnTire
findings.evidence: tire-health.service.ts updateTireUsageFromTrip updates vehicleTireSetup totals; Tire.totalKmOnTire not incremented
findings.impact: Per-tire identity km stale after partial replace or rotation analytics; mixed-age tires misreported
findings.reproduction: Enrich trip; compare Tire.totalKmOnTire vs setup.totalKmOnSet
findings.recommendation: Distribute trip km to active Tire rows or document setup-level-only semantics in API
requiredTests: trip enrich updates per-tire km or API documents setup-only

findings.title: Trip kilometers largely not applied to tire setup counters
findings.evidence: Fleet sum totalKmOnSet=282 vs completed trip km 2881.6 in 60d; per-vehicle gaps 148-1287 km
findings.dataQuerySummary: VPS SQL; updateTireUsageFromTrip only from POST enrichTrip
findings.impact: usageFactor and behavior-linked wear under-informed; remaining km overstated
findings.reproduction: Compare vehicle_trips SUM(distance_km) vs vehicle_tire_setups.total_km_on_set for 60d window
findings.recommendation: Chain trip finalize to tire usage or document mandatory enrich; add trip_id processed ledger
requiredTests: trip finalize applies km once
retry enrich does not double-count

findings.title: Identical TireHealthSnapshot rows within same minute
findings.evidence: 2 duplicate groups / 2 extra snapshot rows in 60d window
findings.impact: Inflated snapshot time-series; retention storage growth
findings.reproduction: Run Phase 3 duplicate snapshot SQL on VPS 60d window
findings.recommendation: Dedupe key on snapshot insert or upsert per hour bucket
requiredTests: Manual + scheduled recalc same hour produces one snapshot

findings.title: Duplicate RECALCULATION TireEvent bursts
findings.evidence: 3 event groups with >1 RECALCULATION in same minute
findings.dataQuerySummary: GROUP BY vehicle,set,minute HAVING count>1 on tire_events
findings.impact: Audit trail noise; correlates with duplicate snapshots
findings.reproduction: Run Phase 3 duplicate event SQL on VPS
findings.recommendation: Align manual recalc with scheduler dedupe; transactional idempotency token
requiredTests: Duplicate recalc suppressed within same minute

findings.title: ClickHouse unavailable during audit probe
findings.evidence: docker container synqdrive-clickhouse not running at probe time 2026-07-16
findings.dataQuerySummary: VPS docker ps; HF trip mirror could not be queried
findings.impact: Phase 3 trip telemetry cross-check incomplete; NOT_ENOUGH_DATA for CH-backed validation
findings.reproduction: SSH VPS; docker ps | grep clickhouse
findings.recommendation: Re-run CH queries when container healthy; out of audit scope

findings.title: DIMO kPa stored as bar — wear model misinterprets pressure
findings.evidence: VEHICLE_002 VPS values 274-301 in tire_pressure_*; DIMO catalog unit kPa; computePressureFactor nominal 2.5 bar
findings.impact: Pressure wear factor wrong on sole DIMO TPMS vehicle; treated as extreme over-inflation if bar
findings.reproduction: Query vehicle_latest_states tire_pressure for VEHICLE_002; run computePressureFactor with 275
findings.recommendation: Normalize kPa to bar at DIMO ingest
requiredTests: Pressure factor neutral at 2.5 bar after normalization

findings.title: DIMO tire pressure feed limited to 1/6 vehicles
findings.evidence: Phase 4: only VEHICLE_002 lists all 4 chassisAxleRow*Wheel*TirePressure in availableSignals; VPS 1/6 with non-null pressure in vehicle_latest_states
findings.impact: pressureFactor effectively no_data for 83% of fleet; HM path required for pressure wear
findings.reproduction: Run audit-tire-health-dimo-signals.ts; count vehicles with 4× pressure listed
findings.recommendation: Expand DIMO TPMS fleet coverage; persist HM as primary until DIMO coverage improves
requiredTests: Fleet pressure coverage metric in observability

findings.title: Only 1/5 ground-truth measurements reproducible for as-of backtest
findings.evidence: 5 GT measurements; 4 first-measurement cases NOT_REPRODUCIBLE (no prior anchor, installed_odometer_km null); 1 VEHICLE_004 M2 reproducible
findings.impact: Empirical validation blocked; fleet accuracy claims impossible
findings.reproduction: Run audit-tire-health-backtest.ts on VPS read-only
findings.recommendation: Fix P0-TH-03 and require odometer at measurement for backtest eligibility
requiredTests: Backtest reproduces >=3 vehicles after data fixes

findings.title: modelVersion not persisted on TireHealthSnapshot — historical replay not auditable
findings.evidence: audit-tire-health-backtest.ts documents modelVersionPersistedInDb: false; TireHealthSnapshot schema has no model_version column
findings.dataQuerySummary: Schema review vs DrivingImpactService which persists modelVersion
findings.impact: Cannot audit which formula produced historical snapshots; config drift invalidates replay
findings.reproduction: Inspect TireHealthSnapshot model in schema.prisma; compare to trip driving impact model_version
findings.recommendation: Persist TIRE_HEALTH_V2 version on snapshot and wear data point insert
requiredTests: Snapshot includes modelVersion matching config header

findings.title: Rental blocking uses regex on warningHints and alert.type for pressure severity
findings.evidence: evaluateTires: /niedrig|low|under|alert/i and /tpms|druck|pressure/i
findings.impact: Fragile i18n; PRESSURE_IMPACT alert type does not match tpms regex — may not escalate
findings.reproduction: Unit test evaluateTires with PRESSURE_IMPACT alert type
findings.recommendation: Use TireAlertCode enum and structured pressureContext severity
requiredTests: evaluateTires maps TireAlertCode.PRESSURE_IMPACT to critical

findings.title: evidence_type=measured when tread measurement exists but displayMode may be ESTIMATED
findings.evidence: evaluateTires sets measured if latestMeasurementAt!=null regardless of displayMode from tire-status
findings.impact: Rental health overstates measurement evidence; conflicts with policy for estimated critical tread
findings.reproduction: Vehicle with stale measurement and ESTIMATED displayMode; check rental evidence_type
findings.recommendation: Split wearEvidence and pressureEvidence in read model; respect displayMode
requiredTests: evidence_type estimated when displayMode ESTIMATED

findings.title: No vehicle qualifies as VALIDATION_READY
findings.evidence: 0 manual measurements in 60d for 4/6 vehicles; installed_odometer null all; 0 ground-truth wear points
findings.impact: Production model validation must remain code-level until data quality improves
findings.reproduction: Open tire-health-fleet-coverage-2026-07.csv; count VALIDATION_READY rows
findings.recommendation: Target VEHICLE_004 for first validation pilot after odometer + trip usage fixes
requiredTests: Fleet coverage classifier integration test

findings.title: exteriorAirTemperature USABLE on 2/6 but not persisted on vehicle_latest_state
findings.evidence: VEHICLE_002 29.8% coverage, VEHICLE_005 5.8%; DimoSnapshotProcessor does not map exteriorAirTemperature to latest state
findings.dataQuerySummary: Phase 4 timeseries CSV; code grep exteriorAirTemperature in processor
findings.impact: temperatureFactor in wear model lacks fleet season context from DIMO ambient temp
findings.reproduction: Compare DIMO exteriorAirTemperature series vs vehicle_latest_states columns
findings.recommendation: Persist ambient temp on snapshot; feed temperatureFactor
requiredTests: Latest state includes exteriorAirTemperature when DIMO provides

findings.title: chassisTireSystemIsWarningOn documented but absent fleet-wide
findings.evidence: 0/6 vehicles list TPMS warning in availableSignals; 0 historical series
findings.impact: Cannot replace HM TPMS warning path with DIMO telltale on current fleet
findings.reproduction: Run DIMO audit; filter chassisTireSystemIsWarningOn listedInAvailableSignals
findings.recommendation: Monitor fleet onboarding; ingest when vehicles report signal
requiredTests: TPMS warning ingest when signal appears in availableSignals

findings.title: isIgnitionOn and obdBarometricPressure high dataSummary count but no historical buckets
findings.evidence: VEHICLE_001 isIgnitionOn dataSummary 4391 but sampleCount 0 in 60d signals query; barometric latest-only on 5 ICE
findings.impact: Audit tooling and future features cannot rely on dataSummary alone for series availability
findings.reproduction: Compare dataSummary numberOfSignals vs signals() bucket count for isIgnitionOn
findings.recommendation: Treat availableSignals + retrievable buckets as gate; document DIMO API limitation
requiredTests: DIMO audit script flags dataSummary vs bucket mismatch

findings.title: Systematic -0.21 mm bias on n=4 suggests slight over-wear projection
findings.evidence: Backtest n=4 wheels VEHICLE_004 M2: bias -0.213 mm, 100% underpredict tread (overpredict wear)
findings.impact: Directional bias hint only — not statistically significant at n=4
findings.reproduction: Run audit-tire-health-backtest.ts; inspect bias column
findings.recommendation: Re-run after P0 fixes with n>=30 wheel readings before tuning k-factor
requiredTests: Backtest suite with n>=30 reports bias CI

findings.title: Measured tread unchanged over 1221 km on VEHICLE_004 — model projected wear anyway
findings.evidence: M1 and M2 measurements both ~7.5 mm FL; model predicted ~7.29 mm after 1221 km odometer delta
findings.impact: Suggests wear rate may be overstated for low-mileage period; behavior factor defaulted 1.0
findings.reproduction: Inspect backtest summary for VEHICLE_004 M1 vs M2 measured vs predicted
findings.recommendation: Increase GT sample; include driving impact snapshot in backtest when available
requiredTests: Backtest with zero-wear GT interval reports low error

findings.title: No tire-specific Prometheus metrics; tire recalculation queue not monitored
findings.evidence: grep tire_ in observability module returns 0; dimo.tire.recalculation absent from MONITORED_QUEUES
findings.impact: No SLO for recalc failures, pressure coverage, or prediction error
findings.reproduction: Grep observability for tire_ metrics and MONITORED_QUEUES
findings.recommendation: Add tire_recalculation_total, tire_pressure_coverage_ratio, queue lag for dimo.tire.recalculation
requiredTests: Metrics endpoint exposes tire recalc counters

findings.title: TireHealthService and evaluateTires untested; 22/30 audit scenarios MISSING
findings.evidence: tire-health-test-coverage-2026-07.csv; 136 backend + 29 frontend tire tests pass but orchestration gaps
findings.impact: Consumer wiring and blocking regressions undetected in CI
findings.reproduction: Open tire-health-test-coverage-2026-07.csv; count MISSING rows
findings.recommendation: Add tire-health.service.spec.ts and rental-health evaluateTires cases
requiredTests: 30/30 audit scenarios covered in CI

findings.title: Notifications follow rental module state not TireHealthSummary.alerts
findings.evidence: projectVehicleHealthWarnings emits TIRE_CRITICAL only when modules.tires warning/critical
findings.impact: Alert duplication risk low but coverage gap for warning-level tire alerts
findings.reproduction: Trace notification projector for PRESSURE_IMPACT-only tire alert
findings.recommendation: Map canonical TireAlertCode to notification types explicitly
requiredTests: Notification fires for each TireAlertCode severity
